title: diplachne procera
intro: Diplachne procera, also known as the giant spear grass or elephant grass, is a type of tropical grass native to Australia and New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Diplachne procera include treating fever, reducing swelling, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's essential oil in aromatherapy.
